description: A selector combining an ordinary equality term with a scope_node subtree term ANDs them: only resources of the named kind AND placed at-or-under the named scope node match, even though a same-kind resource exists under a sibling subtree.

expected.reason: 01J8Z2Q1M8H8N4T0V1W2X3Y4Z7 is excluded (wrong kind, though in the subtree); 01J8Z2Q1M8H8N4T0V1W2X3Y4Z9 is excluded (right kind, but under the sibling site Z8, not the named subtree).
